ID of the banny body shown with the associated assets.","hook":"The hook address of the collection."},"returns":{"backgroundId":"The background attached to the banny body.","outfitIds":"The outfits attached to the banny body."}},"constructor":{"params":{"bannyBodySvg":"The SVG of the banny body.","defaultAlienEyesSvg":"The SVG of the default alien eyes.","defaultMouthSvg":"The SVG of the default mouth.","defaultNecklaceSvg":"The SVG of the default necklace.","defaultStandardEyesSvg":"The SVG of the default standard eyes.","owner":"The owner allowed to add SVG files that correspond to product IDs.","trustedForwarder":"The trusted forwarder for the ERC2771Context."}},"decorateBannyWith(address,uint256,uint256,uint256[])":{"details":"Decoration is allowed when ALL of the following hold: 1. The caller owns the banny body (via `_checkIfSenderIsOwner`). 2. The banny body is not currently locked (`outfitLockedUntil` has not yet passed). 3. For each outfit supplied:    a. The caller is the outfit's current owner, OR    b. The outfit is currently worn by another banny body and the caller owns that banny body.    (If the outfit is unworn, only (a) applies — the outfit owner must be the caller.) 4. For the background supplied (if non-zero):    a. The caller is the background's current owner, OR    b. The background is currently used by another banny body and the caller owns that banny body.    (If the background is unused, only (a) applies — the background owner must be the caller.) 5. Outfit categories must be valid (within recognized range) and passed in ascending order. 6. Conflicting categories are rejected (e.g., a full head blocks individual face pieces;    a full suit blocks separate top/bottom).WARNING: Equipped outfits and backgrounds are held by this contract on behalf of the banny body. When the banny body NFT is transferred to a new owner, all equipped assets remain associated with that body. The new owner of the body effectively gains control of all equipped items. They can unequip them, receiving the outfit NFTs, or re-equip different items. Sellers should unequip valuable outfits before transferring a banny body.","params":{"backgroundId":"The ID of the background that'll be associated with the specified banny.","bannyBodyId":"The ID of the banny body to dress.","hook":"The hook storing the assets.","outfitIds":"The IDs of the outfits that'll be associated with the specified banny. Only one outfit per outfit category allowed at a time and they must be passed in order."}},"isTrustedForwarder(address)":{"details":"Indicates whether any particular address is the trusted forwarder."},"lockOutfitChangesFor(address,uint256)":{"params":{"bannyBodyId":"The ID of the banny body to lock.","hook":"The hook address of the collection."}},"namesOf(address,uint256)":{"params":{"hook":"The hook storing the assets.","tokenId":"The ID of the token to show."},"returns":{"_0":"fullName The full name of the token.","_1":"categoryName The name of the token's category.","_2":"productName The name of the token's product."}},"onERC721Received(address,address,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Make sure tokens can be received if the transaction was initiated by this contract.NFTs sent via transferFrom (not safeTransferFrom) bypass onERC721Received and cannot be tracked or recovered. This is an inherent ERC-721 limitation — the contract cannot prevent non-safe transfers. Users and UIs should always use safeTransferFrom.","params":{"data":"The data of the transfer.","from":"The address that initiated the transfer.","operator":"The address that initiated the transaction.","tokenId":"The ID of the token to transfer."},"returns":{"_0":"The ERC-721 receiver selector."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setMetadata(string,string,string)":{"details":"All fields are always written. Pass the current value for any field you do not want to change, or pass an empty string to clear a field.","params":{"baseUri":"The base URI of the SVG files.","description":"The description to use in token metadata.","url":"The external URL to use in token metadata."}},"setProductNames(uint256[],string[])":{"details":"Product names are mutable — the owner can update them at any time. This is intentional to allow corrections and localization. Names are only used in metadata and do not affect on-chain logic.","params":{"names":"The names of the products.","upcs":"The universal product codes of the products having their name stored."}},"setSvgContentsOf(uint256[],string[])":{"details":"See `setSvgHashesOf` for the trust model. The function reverts on hash mismatch, missing hash, or already-stored content. Publication is one-shot — wrong-hash commitments are unrecoverable by design.","params":{"svgContents":"The svg contents to store, not including the parent <svg></svg> element.","upcs":"The universal product codes of the products having SVGs stored."}},"setSvgHashesOf(uint256[],bytes32[])":{"details":"This allows anyone to lazily upload the correct svg file.","params":{"svgHashes":"The svg hashes to store, not including the parent <svg></svg> element.","upcs":"The universal product codes of the products having SVG hashes stored."}},"svgOf(address,uint256,bool,bool)":{"params":{"hook":"The hook storing the assets.","shouldDressBannyBody":"Whether the banny body should be dressed.","shouldIncludeBackgroundOnBannyBody":"Whether the background should be included on the banny body.","tokenId":"The ID of the token to show. If the ID belongs to a banny body, it will be shown with its current outfits in its current background if specified."},"returns":{"_0":"svg The SVG."}},"tokenUriOf(address,uint256)":{"params":{"hook":"The hook storing the assets.","tokenId":"The ID of the token to show. If the ID belongs to a banny body, it will be shown with its current outfits in its current background."},"returns":{"_0":"tokenUri The URI representing the SVG."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"trustedForwarder()":{"details":"Returns the address of the trusted forwarder."},"userOf(address,uint256)":{"params":{"backgroundId":"The ID of the background to check.","hook":"The hook address of the collection."},"returns":{"_0":"The ID of the banny body using the background."}},"wearerOf(address,uint256)":{"params":{"hook":"The hook address
